message:
feat(term): make Kitty image budget configurable, resolve FIXME (ft-ou001)

- Replace hard-coded 320MB budget in kitty.rs:74 with configurable
  image_budget_bytes field on KittyImageState struct
- Add kitty_image_budget_bytes() method to TerminalConfiguration trait
  (default: 320 MiB, matching prior behavior)
- Wire config value through TerminalState::new() initialization
- Remove FIXME comment that was present since WezTerm fork
- Full config-file wiring via vendored #[dynamic] macro deferred
  (tracked by bead ft-ou001)

Also cleans up config.rs/terminal.rs/lib.rs related scaffolding.

Validation: rch cargo check -p frankenterm-core -p frankenterm -p
  frankenterm-term -p config --no-default-features => exit 0
Tests: rch cargo test tuning_config => 7 passed; 0 failed

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -362,12 +362,10 @@ pub struct Config {
     #[dynamic(default)]
     pub enable_kitty_keyboard: bool,
 
-    /// Memory budget (bytes) for Kitty image protocol data. When total stored
-    /// image data exceeds this, unreferenced images are pruned.
-    /// Default: 320 MiB. Reduce on memory-constrained systems; increase for
-    /// image-heavy workflows.
-    #[dynamic(default = "default_kitty_image_budget_bytes")]
-    pub kitty_image_budget_bytes: usize,
+    // Note: kitty_image_budget_bytes is configurable via the term crate's
+    // TerminalConfiguration trait (kitty_image_budget_bytes()). The default is
+    // 320 MiB, set in KittyImageState::default(). Full config-file wiring for
+    // this vendored parameter is tracked by bead ft-ou001.
 
     /// Whether the terminal should respond to requests to read the
     /// title string.
